body:
…rage

Grafana datasource URL expects Service name
prometheus-stack-kube-prom-prometheus, which requires nameOverride: kube-prom in the kube-prometheus-stack HelmRelease. Without it the chart generates the full-length form prometheus-stack-kube-prometheus-stack-prometheus — Grafana cannot resolve the datasource, so every panel returns No Data.

Also:
- storageSpec: 20Gi local-path PVC so metrics survive pod restarts (was ephemeral — any restart wiped all data)
- memory limit: 1Gi to 2Gi to reduce OOM risk under sustained load
- inline triage runbook in both manifests for faster future diagnosis

Refs: INFRA-1534
title: fix(grafana): resolve No Data — pin Prometheus nameOverride + add sto…
